results.title: 'Laugh it off': Port's hot property on rumoured offers
results.description: In-demand Port Adelaide star Zak Butters maintains he's not thinking about his future just yet, adding he'll only decide at the end of the season.

results.title: Universidad de Chile coach Gago discharged after heart attack
results.description: June 23 - Universidad de Chile coach Fernando Gago has been discharged after suffering an acute heart attack last week, the Chilean club said on Monday.

results.title: Mbappe scores twice as France beat Iraq at World Cup
results.description: Kylian Mbappe marked his 100th cap by scoring two more World Cup goals on Monday as France eased to a 3-0 win over Iraq in a game delayed by two hours by a severe storm.
